scripts.test: bun run test:cljam && bun run test:cljam-date && bun run test:cljam-integrant && bun run test:cljam-schema && bun run test:cljam-ring
scripts.build:libraries: bun run --filter '@regibyte/cljam' build-npm-library && bun run --filter '@regibyte/cljam-schema' build && bun run --filter '@regibyte/cljam-integrant' build && bun run --filter '@regibyte/cljam-date' build && bun run --filter '@regibyte/cljam-ring' build
